major_findings: Core claim grammar (claim->falsifier->evidence->boundary) is already enforced by claims.yaml + claims_lint; this pass adds stable claim IDs and a source map on top, it does not invent new claims.

Two external-facing wordings carried prestige/marketing residue without a mechanism anchor and were downgraded (see evidence/CLAIM_DOWNGRADE_LEDGER.jsonl): README 'Conference-grade entry points' and SPEC.md 'frontier-lab rigor'; rigor is now shown by docs/REVIEW_PATH.md tracks, not asserted by a label.

Prediction-error / neuroscience language was already disclaimer-bounded in README/SPEC/SYSTEM_CARD; this pass binds it to RAO_BALLARD_1999 as INSPIRATION_ONLY with an explicit no-biological-fidelity boundary (TRI-CLAIM-009).
Supply-chain claims (PR K/L/N/O) are honest at Build L2 / LEVEL_1; bound to SLSA_SPEC + SPDX_SPEC with mandatory not-hermetic / not-L3 wording (TRI-CLAIM-008).
Two structural gaps (independent reproduction, domain breadth) remain OPEN and gate READY/PRODUCTIZABLE in code; mapped as NON_CLAIM_BOUNDARY / OPEN_GAP (TRI-CLAIM-010, TRI-CLAIM-012).
must_not_claim: hermetic or SLSA L3 supply chain
novelty of falsification, change detection, or online estimation
value_lift_summary: Every major external-facing claim resolves to a stable ID with in-repo evidence, a canonical source, an explicit boundary, or a tracked open gap; scripts/check_doc_trust.py blocks regressions in CI. No scientific claim is expanded.
